newsSince: No new material company-specific news since June 9. Aeva's headline wins (exclusive European OEM L3 production contract, NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion reference sensor, Daimler Truck, a top-5 OEM JDP, Forterra defense) all predate June 9 and are reflected in the +92% YTD run. The most recent dated events are a June 3 follow-on equity offering (dilution) and a June 9-12 ITS America showcase of its CityOS platform - neither a new fundamental catalyst. The +10% move since June 9 is momentum, not fresh news.

sources.label: Aeva: exclusive global production contract from top European OEM

verdicts.rankRationale: Humanoid/physical-AI sensing lens: strong 4D LiDAR design-win stack (NVIDIA Hyperion, European OEM L3, Daimler) but all predate June 9 and are priced in; the only fresh items are a June 3 dilutive raise and a minor June 9-12 conference showcase. No new fundamental shift - hold at #21.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: 4D LiDAR ramp into OEM L3 production and physical-AI/NVIDIA Hyperion adoption
verdicts.primaryRisk: Stock has already moved (+92% YTD); 2026 revenue still only $30-36M; recent dilution
verdicts.bull: FMCW 4D LiDAR is a differentiated physical-AI sensing platform with marquee OEM, NVIDIA, and Daimler wins extending into robotics/industrial.
verdicts.neutral: Great sensing story, but the wins are known and 2026 revenue is tiny relative to the rerating.
verdicts.bear: Crowded after a big run, pre-scale revenue, fresh equity dilution; valuation prices much future success.
